keyword: best pet door for wall installation
title: Best Pet Door for Wall Installation (Tunnel Kits & Sizing)
meta: Wall-mounted pet doors with tunnel kits for homes without a suitable door.
intro: A wall install needs a tunnel to bridge the thickness. We cover sizing, tunnel kits and weather sealing.

sections.body: Measure wall thickness; buy a tunnel kit that matches or stacks.
Walls lose heat — choose a double-flap model to cut drafts.
Exterior walls may have wiring/plumbing — inspect before cutting or hire a pro.

products.name: Double-Flap Wall Pet Door
products.asin_query: insulated wall pet door double flap

faq.q: Can I install in a brick wall?
faq.a: Yes with masonry bits; consider a pro for load-bearing walls.
Seal the frame with exterior caulk; double flaps reduce drafts.
